name: req
description: 需求全流程工作流管理 - 从需求分析到测试的完整生命周期管理

interface.shortDescription: 需求分析、PRD、开发、测试和发布工作流
interface.longDescription: DevFlow Req provides Codex-native requirement workflows for PRDs, branching, requirement docs, development, testing, review, release notes, and project status tracking.
defaultPrompt: 初始化当前仓库的需求工作流
创建一个新需求并拆分开发步骤
查看当前需求状态和下一步
